name: Path Selected
description: Complete the assessment and select a learning path.

name: First Step
description: Complete the first attested learning activity.

name: Evidence Checker
description: Complete learning or practice focused on evaluating AI output.

name: Workflow Designer
description: Complete learning or practice focused on AI-assisted workflows.

name: Role-Aligned Learner
description: Complete learning aligned to selected professional work.

name: Cross-Functional Learner
description: Complete learning across more than one work pattern.
